abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Two Places at Once
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an ally is placed within 6" of this model, this model may place it anywhere within 2" of its current location.

actions.name: Torn from the Void
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, place this model anywhere within 1" of its current location.

triggers.name: Prey on Nothingness
triggers.text: When resolving, this model may remove a token from the target. If it does so, deal +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Finality
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: Lost Peacebringer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of an Echo marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Temporal Distortion
triggers.text: Give this model a Backtrack token.

actions.name: Slam the Coffin
actions.effects: Make an Echo marker within range. Enemy models within (Y)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.
